positive: Minimalist aesthetic design for a t-shirt print, featuring a stylized, symmetrical depiction of a rising sun over calm, geometric ocean waves. The sun should have clean, radiating lines and vibrant orange, yellow, and peach tones, contrasting against a deep indigo and teal palette for the water. Include abstract, stylized silhouettes of distant mountain peaks on the horizon. The composition must be centrally balanced, highly clean, vector-illustration style, suitable for screen printing. Flat, solid color blocks with sharp edges and clear delineation between elements. Clean, high-contrast, graphic novel style, perfect for apparel art.
negative: photorealistic, photo, blur, grain, messy, text, watermark, signature, logo, debris, low detail, poor composition, extra limbs, mutated, badly drawn
